DAE_J84_NSK_PSP_PS

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 742
Recv ID: 762
Baudrate: 500000
Func Addr: 04
Func Name: Direction assistée

  },

    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "EPS Fault - ECU"
  },

    "name": "EPS fault - Motor"

    "name": "EPS fault - NVM"
  },
  {

    },
    "name": "EPS fault - Torque Sensor"
  },

    "dtc": 22018,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {
      "Tuning Number (Syst Ident)": "0"
    },
    "name": "No tuning set"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 22035,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "IGN Signal Fault"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 22036,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {

      "Motor Temperature": "0",
      "Derating Level": "0"
    },
    "name": "Derating"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 22034,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "No Angle Calibration"
  }
]

Requests

[
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "14FF00",
    "name": "ClearDTC",
    "deny_sds": []
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 5,
    "sentbytes": "21B0",
    "name": "RDBLI - Date of After Sales",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Year": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Day": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Month": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 13,
    "sentbytes": "2106",
    "name": "RDBLI - Internal Faults Store",
    "deny_sds": [
      "nosds",
      "plant",
      "aftersales",
      "engineering"
    ],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Internal NSK fault codes": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "sentbytes": "2104",
    "name": "RDBLI - Pulling Compensation Type",
    "deny_sds": [],

        "firstbyte": 3,

  },

    "deny_sds": [],

        "firstbyte": 3,

    "minbytes": 21,
    "sentbytes": "2101",
    "name": "RDBLI - System Frame",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Angle_ST": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Calibration status": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Consigned Power_ST": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Consigned Torque_ST": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Derating Level": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Engine status": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "ECU Temperature": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Fault indicator_ST": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Power assistance_ST": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Reverse Gear Status": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Torque_ST": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Vehicle Speed": {
        "firstbyte": 15,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Velocity_ST": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Voltage_ST": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Angle Sensor Index Status": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Calculated Angle Offset": {
        "firstbyte": 18,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Limited Pulling Comp Torque": {
        "firstbyte": 19,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Motor Temperature": {
        "firstbyte": 20,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Filtered Vehicle Speed": {
        "firstbyte": 21,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 26,
    "sentbytes": "2180",
    "name": "RDBLI - System Identification RENAULT",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Diagnostic Identification Code": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Edition Number": {
        "firstbyte": 19,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 12,

      },

        "firstbyte": 26,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 23,
        "ref": true
      },
      "SoftWare Number": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Spare Parts Number": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Supplier Number": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Tuning Number (Syst Ident)": {
        "firstbyte": 21,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Tuning version (Syst Ident)": {
        "firstbyte": 22,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },

    "sentbytes": "2100",
    "name": "RDBLI- Supported LI",

        "firstbyte": 4
      },
      "Driver Torque (FF)": {
        "firstbyte": 9
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "shiftbytescount": 3,
    "sentbytes": "17FF00",
    "name": "ReadDTC",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "MoreDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Standard Fault": {

        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "Historical Failure": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "Current Failure": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "FirstDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "NDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      }
    }
  },
